title: Use calculations within Workflow steps (set number, set name, etc.)
excerpt: Since formula fields cannot be used in automations or workflows, it would be helpful if the input fields in workflows would allow real-time calculations as inputs.  For instance, set an item name to include the year from…

posts.author: becca_colesoft (Becca C)
posts.cookedHtml: Since formula fields cannot be used in automations or workflows, it would be helpful if the input fields in workflows would allow real-time calculations as inputs. For instance, set an item name to include the year from a date field, or if calculations in text fields can’t work, set a number field using the year from a date field (and then use that number field in the item name field).
